statement: NVIDIA B200 cloud rental price around $3.99/GPU-hour median (range $3.75-$5.19/hr on-demand, $3.59/hr spot) on gpucost index.
why: Cloud-rental price inputs for FLOPS-per-dollar; a static price level with no stated change over time.

impact.mechanism: Reference GPU rental price level; display overlay that does not score demand or supply.

evidence.excerpt: cloud rental per GPU-hour: minimum '$3.75/hr' (Genesis Cloud), median '$3.99/hr' (Datacrunch), maximum '$5.19/hr' (RunPod on-demand), spot '$3.59/hr'

confidence.basis: Secondary pricing aggregators (gpucost.org, corroborated directionally by getdeploying.com); two publishers, not filing-grade.
